properties.send_for_necropsy_other: Taken to Sealife. Died en route. Carcass at Sealife for disposal.
properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Large barnacles, algal presence on carapace. Heavy load of small barnacles across head and soft tissues.
heavy algae coverage across whole carapace, small barnacle coverage

properties.injury_desc: Tattered section of dorsal fin mostly healed.
properties.cause_of_stranding: Hooked/entangled in fishing line or ingested fishing line
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: INJESTED HOOK with 30cm trailing line through gills.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Small white lice on body (samples taken for University)
properties.injury_desc: Left pec fin has old/healed injury (or potential deformity given young age?) Predatory rake marks on body. 2 small wounds near right pec fin and behind dorsal fin (cyamids present).
properties.sample_one_id: Whole carcass in freezer, awaiting permits - future necropsy possible.

properties.lumps_and_growths_desc: Fibropapiloma tumours present on flippers and carapace

properties.injury_desc: There was an injury to the underside of the body, between the pec fins, that appeared to be a bite from a cookie-cutter shark. Cuts/abrasions to the dorsal fin and peduncle. Multiple fresh, superficial scratches on the body from tumbling over the rocks.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy biofoul evident in image over carapace.
Burrowing barnacle, holes in carapace  skeleton
properties.injury_desc:
Skin fragmented and bones broken apart
Old holes of barnacles in the skeleton
